lyrics.text: 孙燕姿 - Hey Jude
Hey jude  don't make it bad
lyrics.translation: 嘿 Jude 别再沮丧了

lyrics.text: Take a sad song  and make it better
lyrics.translation: 唱一首悲伤的歌让一切好起来吧

lyrics.text: Remember  to let her into your heart
lyrics.translation: 记得让她进入你的心房

lyrics.text: Then you can start  to make it better
lyrics.translation: 让一切开始变好

lyrics.text: Hey jude don't be afraid
lyrics.translation: 嘿 Jude 别害怕

lyrics.text: You were made to  go out and get her
lyrics.translation: 你生来就要得到她

lyrics.text: The minute  you let her under your skin
lyrics.translation: 当你与她相爱时

lyrics.text: Then  you begin  to make it better
lyrics.translation: 一切开始变得更好了

lyrics.text: And  anytime you feel the pain  hey jude refrain
lyrics.translation: 无论何时当你感到痛苦 嘿 Jude 坚持一下

lyrics.text: Don't carry the world  upon your shoulders
lyrics.translation: 别把一切扛在肩上

lyrics.text: For well you know that it's a fool  who plays it cool
lyrics.translation: 你知道装作漠不关心

lyrics.text: By making his world  a little  colder
lyrics.translation: 故作坚强是愚蠢的

lyrics.text: Na na  na na  na na na  na
lyrics.translation: 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐

lyrics.text: Hey jude  don't let me down
lyrics.translation: 嘿 Jude 别让我失望

lyrics.text: You have found her  now go and get her
lyrics.translation: 现在 爱你所爱

lyrics.text: Remember  to let her into your heart
lyrics.translation: 记得让她进入你的心房

lyrics.text: Then you can start  to make it  better
lyrics.translation: 让一切开始变好

lyrics.text: So let it out and let it in  hey jude begin
lyrics.translation: 所以让往事不再重提 嘿Jude 让一切继续吧

lyrics.text: You're waiting for someone to  perform  with
lyrics.translation: 你在等待谁去邀你共舞呢

lyrics.text: And don't you know that it's just you hey jude you'll do
lyrics.translation: 你知道吗 Jude 你自己可以的

lyrics.text: The movement you need is on your shoulder
lyrics.translation: 你已经在路上了

lyrics.text: Na na na na na na na na
lyrics.translation: 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐 呐

lyrics.text: Remember  to let her under your skin
lyrics.translation: 记得永远爱她

lyrics.text: Then you'll begin  to make it
lyrics.translation: 让一切好起来吧

lyrics.text: Better better better better better  better  oh
lyrics.translation: 让一切好起来吧 好起来吧
